case_title: LENDIFY FINANCIAL VS. JOSE F. SANTIAGO ALVAREZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,622.72 FILED BY LENDIFY FINANCIAL AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, JOSE F. SANTIAGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 25, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, JOSE F. SANTIAGO $1,622.72 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,732.72 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, JOSE F. SANTIAGO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00) SERVED JAN-24-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, JOSE F. SANTIAGO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, JOSE F. SANTIAGO
